package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for password_stored_as_plaintext: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: struct fields named `Password`, `Passwd`, or `Pwd` stored as plain string in database models without hashing
type User struct {
    ID       string
    Username string
    Password string    `gorm:"column:password"`
    Passwd  string    `gorm:"column:passwd"`
    Pwd     string    `gorm:"column:pwd"`
    Email   string
}
